cards.name: Headhunter
cards.description: Your ball deals +1 damage per level to blocks on the TOP row of the field — reward for reaching the far blocks.

cards.name: Underdog
cards.description: Your ball deals +1 damage per level to blocks in the BOTTOM two rows of the field.

cards.name: Opening Gambit
cards.description: Your FIRST kill each level detonates a small blast around it (2 damage, +1 per level). Once per level.

cards.name: Cleanup Crew
cards.description: Once 6 or fewer blocks remain, your ball deals +2 damage per level — closes out the tail, never the main fight.

cards.name: Bank Shot
cards.description: Each wall bounce before you connect banks +1 damage onto your next block hit (cap rises with level), then resets — reward for setting up the carom.

cards.name: Executioner's Edge
cards.description: A CRIT against a block already at low HP executes it for DOUBLE crit damage. Higher levels widen the low-HP window.

cards.name: Overkill
cards.description: When a hit overkills a block (more than double its HP), the EXCESS damage carries through to the block directly behind it. Only the surplus spills.

cards.name: Erosion
cards.description: Your ball can finally wear down INDESTRUCTIBLE walls: about 16 hits crack one (fewer per level). A heavy commitment.

cards.name: Dead Center
cards.description: A PERFECT deflect (caught dead-center) supercharges your next block hit for a burst of bonus damage. Skill reward.

cards.name: Metronome
cards.description: Each consecutive PERFECT deflect adds +1 ball damage (it stacks). A single non-perfect deflect resets the streak to zero.

cards.name: Phase Window
cards.description: While your combo is 15+ (lower per level), the ball PHASES through blocks — punching through them without bouncing. Breaking the combo (any paddle touch) closes the window.

cards.name: Avalanche
cards.description: During a hot combo (8+), a kill has a chance (rising per level) to send the dead block crashing DOWN, crushing the block beneath it.

cards.name: Keystone
cards.description: Destroy a load-bearing block (one with a stack above it) and there is a chance to crack the support — the whole column above collapses into the gap.

cards.name: Domino
cards.description: Kill 3 or more blocks within one second and the NEXT kill detonates in a chain explosion. Reward for fast, tight clears.

cards.name: Martyr's Brand
cards.description: When an enemy takes HP from you, vengeance flares: your ball deals bonus damage for a few seconds (longer per level). You must be hit to benefit.

cards.name: Ricochet
cards.description: Every side-wall bounce has a chance (rising per level) to fire a horizontal bolt straight across that lane, off the wall — a free sweep.

cards.name: Sleight of Hand
cards.description: Catch a pickup DEAD-CENTRE on the paddle and it duplicates — an identical second pickup drops right above you. Precision reward.

cards.name: Hot Hand
cards.description: Your ball GROWS each time your combo passes a milestone (every 5 kills) — wider coverage as you stay hot. It keeps its size until you drop or serve a fresh ball.

cards.name: Redline
cards.description: The longer the ball flies without touching your paddle, the FASTER and HARDER it hits (up to +40% speed) — but the speed makes it harder to catch. Touching the paddle resets it.

cards.name: Channeling
cards.description: Mana regen PAUSES while the ball is flying up the board, but DOUBLES while you cradle it low near the paddle. A control-playstyle tradeoff.
